mood.label: CAUTIOUSLY-RISK-ON
mood.summary: Markets are in a holding pattern ahead of the Federal Reserve's first interest rate decision under new Chair Kevin Warsh. A tentative U.S.-Iran deal has sent oil prices lower, easing some inflation fears, but all eyes are on the Fed's tone and economic projections.

indicesNarrative: US equity futures are pointing to a slightly higher open, with the Nasdaq showing relative strength. The Dow hit a record high yesterday, but the S&P 500 and Nasdaq pulled back. The main focus for today is the Federal Reserve's policy announcement and press conference.
sectorsNarrative: Technology stocks are looking to rebound after a recent selloff. The drop in oil prices is weighing on the energy sector.

movers.why: Jabil Inc. is expected to report its quarterly earnings today.
Keysight Technologies is showing strong pre-market gains.
Match Group Inc. is among the top pre-market gainers.
AST SpaceMobile is gaining ahead of its planned satellite launch.
Wolfspeed is seeing positive momentum in pre-market trading.
Envista Holdings is one of the top pre-market losers.
Lionsgate Studios is seeing significant pre-market selling pressure.
Amer Sports is declining in pre-market trading.

traderLens.name: Minervini
traderLens.view: Market is in a holding pattern. Awaiting confirmation of a clear uptrend before committing heavily.

traderLens.name: Ted Zhang
traderLens.view: Rotation out of energy and into tech may continue if oil prices remain subdued.

traderLens.name: Clement Ang
traderLens.view: A-grade setups are scarce before the Fed announcement. Best to wait for clarity.

traderLens.name: SRxTrades
traderLens.view: Volume is light ahead of the FOMC. Wait for volume confirmation on any breakouts.

traderLens.name: Jeff
traderLens.view: Stick to your trading plan. Don't let FOMC speculation lead to impulsive decisions.

traderLens.name: Qullamaggie
traderLens.view: Some episodic pivots may be setting up, but the overall market needs to be supportive for breakouts to follow through.

traderLens.name: Composite
traderLens.view: Patience is key today. Observe the market's reaction to the Fed's announcement before taking on new risk. Focus on managing existing positions.

alert: FOMC rate decision and press conference at 2:00 PM and 2:30 PM ET.

news.headline: U.S. Stock Futures Rise Ahead of First Fed Decision Under Chair Kevin Warsh
Oil Prices Stabilize After U.S.-Iran Deal Sparks Selloff
